context: Tests whether the agent implements correct CDN cache headers, dimension allowlisting for security, Cloudinary-specific configuration (gravity, quality, fetch_format, dpr, sign_url), content-hash-based cache busting, and eager pre-generation of image variants at upload time.

checklist.name: Cache-Control immutable
checklist.description: Image API response sets Cache-Control header to 'public' with max-age of 31536000 (1 year) AND includes 'immutable'

checklist.name: Vary Accept header
checklist.description: Image API response includes a Vary: Accept header

checklist.name: Dimension allowlist
checklist.description: Image API validates requested dimensions against a fixed allowlist and returns a 400 error for unlisted dimensions

checklist.name: Cloudinary gravity auto
checklist.description: getProductImageUrl uses gravity: 'auto' (or equivalent) for smart subject-aware crop

checklist.name: Cloudinary quality auto
checklist.description: getProductImageUrl uses quality: 'auto:good' (or equivalent perceptual quality setting)

checklist.name: Cloudinary fetch_format auto
checklist.description: getProductImageUrl uses fetch_format: 'auto' (or equivalent) to auto-serve WebP/AVIF based on Accept header

checklist.name: Cloudinary dpr auto
checklist.description: getProductImageUrl includes dpr: 'auto' in transformations to serve 2x on Retina displays

checklist.name: Cloudinary sign_url
checklist.description: getProductImageUrl or cloudinary.url() call includes sign_url: true

checklist.name: Eager transformations on upload
checklist.description: uploadProductImage uses 'eager' transformations array to pre-generate at least two size variants at upload time

checklist.name: Eager async upload
checklist.description: uploadProductImage sets eager_async: true so pre-generation does not block the upload response

checklist.name: Content hash in filename
checklist.description: Versioned upload utility derives a hash from the file buffer content (e.g., SHA-256) and includes it in the storage key/filename

checklist.name: No manual cache purge
checklist.description: ARCHITECTURE.md or code comments explain that URL versioning (new URL per content change) is used instead of manual CDN cache invalidation

checklist.name: WebP for on-demand transforms
checklist.description: Code or documentation indicates WebP (not AVIF) is used for on-demand image transformation, with AVIF pre-generated at upload time
